step_rationale: Lymphatic and macrophage marker; identifies cellular composition in thrombus and atheroma.
mechanism: LYVE1 marks lymphatic endothelial and macrophage infiltration in thrombus and plaque.

references.title: Single cell RNA sequencing of haematopoietic cells in fresh and frozen human atheroma tissue.
Functions and Regeneration of Mature Cardiac Lymphatic Vessels in Atherosclerosis, Myocardial Infarction, and Heart Failure.
Co-expression of vascular and lymphatic endothelial cell markers on early endothelial cells present in aspirated coronary thrombi from patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
